name: safetyInspection
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.passRate === undefined || (Number.isFinite(output.result.passRate) && output.result.passRate >= 0 && output.result.passRate <= 100)
output.ok === false || output.result.overallResult === undefined || typeof output.result.overallResult === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.inspectionItems (NecCodeCalc runDomain wrapper, peeled at dispatch). Per-item severity = critical|minor|ok from passed/critical flags; overallResult = FAIL (any critical fail) | PASS (all pass) | CONDITIONAL (minor fails). passRate = round(passed/total×100), bounded 0..100 since length>0 is guarded (empty returns the honest 'Add inspection items' prompt, not a fabricated verdict). Cards render results[].{item,code,passed,severity,notes} + total/passed/failed/criticalFailures/passRate/overallResult EXACTLY (field-aligned against SafetyChecklist). No STATE, no DB.
